listing_method: 3M catalog (SNAPS2 SPA) exposes a JSON API discovered in the listing page HTML. Listing endpoint: https://www.3m.com/snaps2/api/pcp/https/www.3m.com/3M/en_US/p/c/labels/{facet-path} returns first 51 items + facet aggregations + total. Full enumeration via the show-next endpoint with size/start pagination params: https://www.3m.com/snaps2/api/pcp-show-next/https/www.3m.com/3M/en_US/p/c/labels/?size=400&start=0 (a large size returns the whole set in one response). Industry facets use path segment /i/<industry>/: fetched .../p/c/labels/i/manufacturing/?size=200&start=0 (193 items), .../i/automotive/ (145), .../i/electronics/ (143), .../i/transportation/ (150), plus the unfiltered .../p/c/labels/ (199). Products keyed by detail-page URL (items[].url, e.g. https://www.3m.com/3M/en_US/p/d/v000238623/); material_number is items[].catalogNumber; stock_number is items[].stockNumber (7-digit 3M ID). industries lists which of the 4 fetched facets each product appeared in; products with empty industries appeared only in the unfiltered listing. Fetched with curl, Chrome UA, --compressed, 1s sleep. All URLs below were seen verbatim in fetched JSON responses. For 88 items the API catalogNumber field was empty; where the title contained 'Label Material(s) <code>' the code was extracted from the fetched title text (regex on title only, no guessing); remaining items keep material_number empty for the extraction phase to resolve from the detail page. Note: material 7800 appears twice (fixed-size case v000090135 and configurable roll b5005329110) - same material, two catalog detail pages; extraction phase should merge. 9 remaining entries with empty material_number are family/equipment pages (e.g. 'Laser Printable Label Materials', 'VP5000 Thermal Imaging System Core').
site_total_claimed: 199 total in Labels category (API 'total' field); 193 for industry=Manufacturing; 145 Automotive; 143 Electronics; 150 Transportation
